svg.text: 🗣️ Phrase book — you say one line, the system moves a whole chain
Left: you, in plain language. Right: what actually happens. These aren't commands — your own wording works; routing is the leader's job.

g.text: "Has anyone done X?"
🔭 scout flies — every citation verified live, adversarially
lands: docs/lit/<topic>.md (novelty verdict: NOVEL / CROWDED / DONE)
"Let's preregister X"
📝 leader writes it with you — success criteria + kill condition; auditor design-checks
lands: docs/prereg/x.md + design-audit trace (FAIL blocks implementation)
"Implement and run it"
🔧 engineer executes — smoke first, then production, 3 seeds
lands: experiments/results/<run>/ (manifest + per-seed results)
"Are these numbers real?"
🔍 auditor checks every number against the files, adversarially
lands: verdict + trace (audit_passed only on full PASS — the key that unlocks "verified")
"Draft the results section"
✍️ writer drafts inside the firewall — audited claims only, numbers pasted never recalled
lands: paper/src/ (a missing claim stops the writer — it asks, it never invents)
"Make the progress deck"
📽️ presenter builds it — figures are PDF screenshots, judgment slides stay blank for you
lands: presentations/<deck>/ (paper-study decks ship a confusion ledger = your reading list)
"Show me the tree"
🌳 the growth tree — every thread at its true station, dead branches kept honestly
view: docs/fleet/tree.html (animated SVG) or --ascii in any terminal
"Wrap up" ★
📋 steward harvests the whole day: handoff page + growth tree + the entire Obsidian vault
THE phrase that grows the vault — daily note, line notes, concept-card stubs, paper notes, MOC in one pass
"Optimize the fleet"
🎯 coach mines the outcome ledger — evidence-cited proposals, none self-applying
lands: docs/fleet/improvement_<date>.md (approving them is your call)

svg.text: Lost? Ask "where were we?" — the leader reads docs/CURRENT_STATE.md and tells you. Suspect a skipped gate: python tools/fleet_status.py
